childhood.familyBackground: Currie was born into a manufacturing family with deep roots in British industrial heritage. His family operated textile and metal manufacturing businesses.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 커리는 영국 산업 유산에 깊은 뿌리를 가진 제조 가족에 태어났다.
childhood.earlyLife: Currie modernized his family's manufacturing operations and expanded into precision engineering. He became known for quality manufacturing and innovation.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 커리는 가족의 제조 운영을 현대화했고 정밀 엔지니어링으로 확장했다.

careerTimeline.event: Took over family manufacturing business and began modernization
careerTimeline.eventKo: 가족 제조 사업을 인수하고 현대화 시작

careerTimeline.event: Expanded into precision engineering and advanced manufacturing
careerTimeline.eventKo: 정밀 엔지니어링 및 첨단 제조로 확장

careerTimeline.event: Achieved billionaire status through manufacturing excellence
careerTimeline.eventKo: 제조 우수성을 통해 억만장자 지위 달성

failures.description: Investments in emerging market manufacturing suffered from political instability
failures.descriptionKo: 신흥 시장 제조 투자가 정치적 불안정으로 인해 악영향을 받음
failures.lesson: Political risk must be carefully evaluated in emerging market investments
failures.lessonKo: 신흥 시장 투자에서 정치적 위험을 신중하게 평가해야 한다

quotes.text: British manufacturing quality remains the global standard
quotes.textKo: 영국 제조 품질은 여전히 글로벌 표준이다

recommended.title: The Machine That Changed the World
recommended.author: James Womack
recommended.note: Influenced his approach to lean manufacturing and efficiency
recommended.noteKo: 린 제조 및 효율성에 대한 접근 방식에 영향을 미침

personalTraits.knownFor: Manufacturing excellence; precision engineering; British industrial leadership
personalTraits.knownForKo: 제조 우수성; 정밀 엔지니어링; 영국 산업 리더십
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports manufacturing education and apprenticeships in Britain
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 영국의 제조 교육 및 견습 지원
